description: Generated tomorrow plan is persisted and retrievable via classroom plans history

input.teacher_reflection: Amira struggled during the math block with multi-digit subtraction and needed the hundreds chart. Brody finished his reading response early and distracted Farid. Chantal helped Elena with the science vocab without being asked — great peer support moment.
input.teacher_goal: Better pacing for math block. Prepare an extension task for Brody. Reinforce Chantal's peer mentoring.
